gods.name: ⚠️ THIS APP IS NO LONGER AVAILABLE
gods.of: Please switch to our new app
gods.offers: This app is no longer updated. Install "Team Builder Guide for TFT" to keep getting the latest TFT meta.

stages.title: Option 1: Open the download link
values: You'll be redirected to Google Play (Android) or App Store (iOS)
Install the app from the corresponding store

stages.title: Option 2: Search on the app store
values: Open Google Play (Android) or App Store (iOS)
Search for: "Team Builder Guide for TFT"
Install and open the app for the latest data

features.name: Unreal Engine
features.description: TFT is moving to Unreal Engine as a long-term project. Cosmetics such as tacticians, arenas, and booms will move over gradually, and a dedicated PC client is planned for October.

features.name: Wisps
features.description: Wisps appear in the rightmost shop slot every other round during the planning phase. Buy up to one per round for combat, shop, gold/XP, item, and other effects.

features.name: Flexible Synergy Units
features.description: Blossom, Riftbeast, Elderwood, Sprykin, Coven, and other new traits create more flexible pivots and high-roll moments.

wisps.title: Wisps
wisps.description: Wisps are one-time shop effects inspired by Charms, redesigned for Enchanted Wilds.

info.title: Shop timing
info.description: Wisps appear in the rightmost shop slot every other round and can only be purchased during the planning phase.

info.title: One per round
info.description: You can buy up to one Wisp each round. If you skip it, the unit hidden behind the Wisp is revealed after planning.

info.title: Seven categories
info.description: Wisps are grouped into Champion, Combat, Misc, Shop, Gold/XP, Risky, and Item categories, with colors that make them easier to scan.

info.title: Late-game combat
info.description: As the game progresses, Wisps become stronger and more expensive. After Stage 5, every other Wisp offer is a Combat Wisp.

wisps.all_wisps_description: Explore all 200 Wisps coming in Set 18 by category.

wisps.name: Grandmaster
wisps.description: Gain a random 2-star 5-cost champion.

wisps.name: Lost Travelers
wisps.description: Gain 3 gold worth of random champions.

wisps.name: Field of Mice
wisps.description: Gain a Tiny Duplicator for each unique 1-cost champion you field.

wisps.name: Big Guns

wisps.name: Three Me

wisps.name: Mitosis
wisps.description: Gain a Tiny Duplicator.

wisps.name: Terraforming
wisps.description: Gain 5 Greenfather seeds at the start of combat.

wisps.name: Blood Ritual

wisps.name: Lesser Chaos

wisps.name: Healing Pool

synergys.name: Apex Predator
synergys.description: Elder Dragon takes up 2 team slots and grants +2 to the Riftbeast trait.

synergys.name: Attuned
synergys.description: Your strongest Alune cycles to a new phase of the moon after each cast. While the moon is at or below half full, your team gains ?% Durabilty. While above, your team gains ?% Damage Amp.

synergys.name: Avatar
synergys.description:
Having an Avatar on your bench or board transforms all other Avatars in your shop to the Trait of that Avatar. Only one person can have an Avatar with a given trait.

An Avatar's chosen Trait is counted twice for Trait bonuses.

synergys.name: Bounty Seeker
synergys.description: Choose a bounty. Your strongest Draven can progress on the bounty to earn its reward. Upon completing a bounty, choose another.

synergys.name: Emerald Aspect
synergys.description: Drag an ally onto your strongest Taric to pair them, granting the ally powerful bonuses from Taric's ability.

The ally on the Eldritch hex is sacrificed at combat start, granting your team Health.

synergys.name: Inferno
synergys.description:
Inferno damage Burns and ?% Wounds enemies for ? seconds. Inferno Burns stack with other Burns.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second.
Wound: Reduces healing received.

effects.text:
(3)
After combat, ? of your shop slots without an Inferno champion ignites, rolling a champion one tier higher
After combat, ? of your shop slots without an Inferno champion ignites, rolling a champion one tier higher

synergys.name: Lunar
synergys.description:
Lunar champions and adjacent allies gain Attack Speed and Ability Power. Lunar champions gain ?% more.

...the moon brings death and syzygy.

synergys.name: Primal
synergys.description: Choose one of four Primal Blessings.

synergys.name: Riftbeast
synergys.description: See the breakpoint effects below.

effects.count:
(3)
Use the Alpha Mark to grant a Riftbeast their unique Buff
effects.text:
(5)
Every ? combats, your next shop is overrun with Riftbeasts
Use the Alpha Mark to grant a Riftbeast their unique Buff
Every ? combats, your next shop is overrun with Riftbeasts
On combat start and every 5 seconds Riftbeasts grow gaining ?% AD, ?% AP, ?% AS, ? Armor, ? MR, ? Health, ? Mana Regen

synergys.name: Rival
synergys.description: Only applies to your strongest Rival.

effects.count:
(1)
Only active while fielding 1 Rival. Rivals collect takedowns, gaining 3 if they takedown another Rival.

effects.text: Only active while fielding 1 Rival. Rivals collect takedowns, gaining 3 if they takedown another Rival.

synergys.name: Solar
synergys.description: See the breakpoint effects below.

effects.text:
Your champions gain a ?% max Health shield and deal ?% bonus magic damage. Gain additional bonuses for each unique 3-star champion:

1+: Increase shield and magic damage by ?% for each 3-star.
?: ?% AS and ? Armor/MR
?: Convert ?% True Damage of the bonus magic damage to true damage.
?: Your 3-star champions ascend to 4-star during combat.

When the sun shines on heroes three and three...

synergys.name: Sprykin
synergys.description:
Gain the Big Furry Friend. Drop a Sprykin on the BFF to pick its Rider.

The BFF's attacks and Ability change if the Rider is melee or ranged.

effects.count:
(3)
The Rider gains ?% Health and ?% AS
effects.text:
(5)
?% Health, ?% AS, and ?% of the BFF's Ability applies to your team
The Rider gains ?% Health and ?% AS
?% Health, ?% AS, and ?% of the BFF's Ability applies to your team
?% Health, ?% AS, and ?% of the BFF's Ability applies to your Sprykin champions.

synergys.name: Adaptor
synergys.description:
Innate: Adaptor abilities change depending on if their Attack Damage or Ability Power is higher.

Adaptors gain Ability Power or Attack Damage, depending on which is higher.

synergys.name: Brawler
synergys.description: Your team gains ?% max Health. Brawlers gain more.

synergys.name: Defender
synergys.description: Your team gains ? Armor and Magic Resist. Defenders gain more.

synergys.name: Executioner
synergys.description: Precision: Ability damage can critically strike. Extra Precision grants 10% Critical Strike Damage.

effects.count:
(2)
Executioners gain Precision and ?% Critical Strike Chance.
effects.text:
(3)
Additionally, enemies bleed for ?% bonus true damage over ? seconds.
Executioners gain Precision and ?% Critical Strike Chance.
Additionally, enemies bleed for ?% bonus true damage over ? seconds.

synergys.name: Hunter
synergys.description: Hunters gain Attack Damage. If a Hunter hasn't swapped targets for ? seconds, they gain ?% Damage Amp.

synergys.name: Invoker
synergys.description: Your team gains Mana Regen, increased for Invokers.

synergys.name: Juggernaut
synergys.description: Your team gains Durability. Juggernauts gain more.

synergys.name: Rapidfire
synergys.description: Your team gains ?% Attack Speed. Rapidfire champions gain more on every attack, up to ? stacks.

synergys.name: Ravager
synergys.description: Ravagers gain ?% Omnivamp. Additionally, Ravagers deal bonus damage, doubled against units below ?% Health.

synergys.name: Spellweaver
synergys.description: Your team gains ?% Ability Power. Spellweavers gain more, plus extra Ability Power whenever a Spellweaver casts an Ability.

synergys.name: Summoner
synergys.description:
Summoners empower their summons in different ways.

Yorick: +?% Health
Azir: +?% Damage
Raptor: +?% Damage
Zyra: +? Plant Attacks

synergys.name: Vanguard
synergys.description: At Combat Start and after dropping below ?% Health, Vanguards gain a max Health Shield for ? seconds.

effects.text: ?% max Health. Gain ? Durability while Shielded.

augments.name: Rolling For Days
augments.description: Gain free Shop rerolls.

augments.name: Capital Gains I
augments.description: Store gold equal to of the interest you earn. On -, gain all the stored gold. Gain gold now.

augments.name: Champ Delivery
augments.description: Gain -cost champions. After rounds, gain more.

augments.name: Champ Delivery +
augments.description: Gain -cost champions. After rounds, gain more.

augments.name: Champ Delivery ++
augments.description: Gain -cost champions. After rounds, gain more.

augments.name: Flame On
augments.description: The Inferno champion that dealt the most damage last combat is On Fire, gaining Attack Speed. Gain a Varus and an Akali.

augments.name: Future Focused
augments.description: Your Tactician loses Health, but after player combats, gain 4-cost champions and gold.

augments.name: Loaded Dice
augments.description: Your dice always roll 6 and your coins always flip heads. Roll a die and gain gold equal to the number rolled. Then flip a coin and gain gold if you flip heads.

augments.name: Quick Streaks
augments.description: You gain twice as much progress towards win and loss streaks. Gain gold.

augments.name: Residual Magic
augments.description: Your team gains Health. Each time you purchase a Wisp, increase this by.

augments.name: Residual Magic +
augments.description: Your team gains Health. Each time you purchase a Wisp, increase this by.

augments.name: Residual Magic ++
augments.description: Your team gains Health. Each time you purchase a Wisp, increase this by.

augments.name: Verticality I
augments.description: Champions gain Attack Damage, Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist for each ally that shares a trait with them.

augments.name: Weight The Worth
augments.description: Whenever you 3-star a champion, gain a copy of them each round for the rest of the game. Gain a Lesser Champion Duplicator.

augments.name: Wisp Rebate
augments.description: Each time you purchase a Wisp, gain gold. Gain gold now.

augments.name: Wisp Rebate +
augments.description: Each time you purchase a Wisp, gain gold. Gain gold now.

augments.name: Cybernetic Implants II
augments.description: Your champions holding an item gain Health and Attack Damage.

augments.name: Cybernetic Uplink II
augments.description: Your champions holding an item gain Health and Mana Regen. Gain a Tear of the Goddess.

augments.name: Beast Within
augments.description: Primal grants an additional Blessing. Gain a Vi.

augments.name: Blossom's Call
augments.description: When you buy a Wisp, gain a random Blossom champion based on the Wisp's cost. Gain 3 Blossom champions.

augments.name: Bonus Gift
augments.description: Whenever you open a loot orb, you have a chance to gain a gray loot orb. Gain gray loot orbs.

augments.name: Bonus Gift +
augments.description: Whenever you open a loot orb, you have a chance to gain a gray loot orb. Gain gray loot orbs.

augments.name: Capital Gains II
augments.description: Store gold equal to of the interest you earn. On -, gain all the stored gold. Gain gold now.

augments.name: Chosen of the Sun
augments.description: Gain a Leona, a Kayle, and a Sejuani. Leona gains permanent max Health each round, increased by for each unique 3-star champion fielded.

augments.name: Consuming Flora
augments.description: Gain a Flora Fatalis emblem. The champion holding the emblem gains double benefits from the Flora Fatalis trait and gains Mana Regen.

augments.name: Coven Acolyte
augments.description: When you choose to continue gathering Coven essence, heal Tactician health. Gain a Camille, an Elise, and a Caitlyn.

augments.name: Dark Ritual
augments.description: Converting Coven Essence to rewards grants Coven champions Ability Power instead of loot. Gain a Camille, an Elise, and a Caitlyn.

augments.name: Embiggen
augments.description: Your Fae pixies are larger and grant more Attack Damage and Ability Power. Gain a Xayah and a Rakan.

augments.name: FOURcing
augments.description: Gain a random 4-cost champion. For each item equipped to that champion, your team gains health.

augments.name: Item Extraction
augments.description: The first times you sacrifice a champion in the Eldritch hex, gain a copy of a random component they're holding. Gain a Veigar, a Rek'Sai, and item removers.

augments.name: Jungle Pathing
augments.description: Gain a Pebbles, a Cinderling, a Scuttle Crab, and a Murkwolf. Each time you level up, gain a new Riftbeast and gold.

augments.name: Money Hungry+
augments.description: Gain gold now, then gold at the start of every stage. Picking up gold makes your Tactician larger.

augments.name: Nature's Shelter
augments.description: Champions that start combat adjacent to an Elderwood plant gain Attack Speed and heal of their maximum Health every seconds. Gain 3 Elderwood champions.

augments.name: Omega Riftbeast
augments.description: You can now choose a second Alpha Riftbeast. Gain 3 Riftbeasts.

augments.name: Razor's Edge
augments.description: Gain a 2-star 2-cost champion and Item Removers. After winning a player combat, gain gold per item component on your item bench.

augments.name: Small Furry Friend
augments.description: While Sprykin is active, gain a second BFF summon that is as powerful. Gain 3 Sprykin champions.

augments.name: Sun and Moon
augments.description: Your Lunar champions gain Health and Damage Amp for each unique Solar champion fielded. Gain a 2-star Leona, a Kayle, and an Aphelios.

augments.name: Verticality II
augments.description: Champions gain Attack Damage, Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist for each ally that shares a trait with them.

augments.name: Buried Treasures III
augments.description: Gain a random item component now and at the start of the next rounds.

augments.name: Component Quest
augments.description: Gain a random component and gold. The next 7 times you win a player combat, gain a different random component. Afterwards, gain a Spatula.

augments.name: Nesting Anvils
augments.description: Gain an Artifact Anvil. After you open it, gain a Completed Item Anvil. After you open that, gain a Component Anvil. After you open that, gain gold.

augments.name: Nesting Anvils +
augments.description: Gain an Artifact Anvil. After you open it, gain a Completed Item Anvil. After you open that, gain a Component Anvil. After you open that, gain gold.

augments.name: Nesting Dolls
augments.description: After a champion dies in combat, spawn a copy of them one star level lower with health. Gain free rerolls

augments.name: Starring Up
augments.description: After 3-starring champions, set your level to. Gain rerolls now and at the start of every round.

augments.name: Trait Ladder
augments.description: Gain a random emblem. After fielding non-unique traits in a player combat, gain a reward. Then increase the number of traits needed and the size of the reward.

augments.name: Verticality III
augments.description: Champions gain Attack Damage, Ability Power, Armor, and Magic Resist for each ally that shares a trait with them.
